summary: Landing page UI sections and embedded auth iframe are implemented, and the contact form UX uses a React Query mutation to call the backend. However, the backend contact-submission model does not meet the required schema (name/email/message/timestamp), is not persisted to stable storage, and the listing query is admin-only and returns only raw text messages. Several unrequested access-control/user-profile features were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add backend support to receive and persist contact form submissions (name, email, message, server timestamp) in stable storage, and expose a query method to list submissions.
missing_requirements.reason: Backend only stores an in-memory `var submissions : [Text]` and `submitContactForm` accepts a single `message : Text` with no structured fields or server timestamp; no stable storage upgrade hooks are shown; listing is `getAllSubmissions` returning `[Text]` and is admin-only rather than a basic verification/testing query for recent submissions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wire the contact form submission to the backend using existing actor/React Query patterns so the backend stores name, email, and message (and can be refetched/invalidated where appropriate) without modifying immutable hook files.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend mutation and form currently submit a single formatted text blob (combined name/email/message) to `actor.submitContactForm(message)` rather than sending structured fields matching the backend requirement (name/email/message). This prevents storing the required structured data on the backend.

hallucinated_features.description: Access control / authorization system initialization and admin-only gating of submissions.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not ask for role-based access control, secret-based initialization, or admin-only viewing for contact submissions; it asked for a simple query to list recent submissions for verification/testing.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile storage and related profile management endpoints.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest scope is a marketing landing page plus contact submission storage; user profiles were not requested.
